columns.name: tidspunkt
columns.description: The timestamp of the event or operation

columns.name: db
columns.description: The name of the database used in the operation

columns.name: client
columns.description: The client application or user that initiated the operation

columns.name: brukerid
columns.description: The identifier of the user who performed the operation

columns.name: sqlcode
columns.description: The SQL error code returned by the database

columns.name: program
columns.description: The name of the program or module that initiated the operation

columns.name: paragraf
columns.description: A paragraph or section within a document, if applicable

columns.name: melding
columns.description: The error message or description associated with the operation

columns.name: ts_name
columns.description: The name of the transaction system involved in the operation

columns.name: server
columns.description: The server where the operation was executed or the database is located
